name: crm-realtime-socket-load-test
description: Socket.io load test for CRM live chat (agent + visitor real-time layer)

scripts.test:light: VISITOR_COUNT=5 AGENT_COUNT=5 RAMP_UP_MS=15000 HOLD_MS=30000 node socket-load-test.js
scripts.test:medium: VISITOR_COUNT=20 AGENT_COUNT=10 RAMP_UP_MS=30000 HOLD_MS=60000 node socket-load-test.js
